metadata.title: KORT.X — Software that moves business
metadata.description: We build websites, apps, systems and full digital platforms. Clean code, intentional design, real delivery.
metadata.keywords: software development, apps, systems, websites, KORT.X

hero.headline: We build software that moves business.
hero.sub: From internal systems to full digital platforms. Clean code, intentional design, real delivery.

whatWeBuild.headline: What we build
whatWeBuild.sub: Every project is a custom solution. We don't use templates.

sites.title: Websites & Platforms
sites.description: Corporate sites, landing pages and web platforms with built-in performance and SEO.

apps.title: Mobile Apps
apps.description: Native and cross-platform apps for iOS and Android, with UX designed for the end user.

systems.title: Internal Systems
systems.description: ERPs, CRMs and internal tools that automate processes and eliminate rework.

landing.title: Landing Pages
landing.description: High-conversion pages for campaigns, launches and lead generation.

ecommerce.title: E-commerce
ecommerce.description: Full online stores with checkout, inventory and payment integrations.

dashboards.title: Dashboards & Panels
dashboards.description: Management dashboards with real-time data, interactive charts and reports.

work.headline: Our work
work.sub: Selected projects that showcase our process and quality.
work.confidential: Client names omitted due to contractual restrictions.

1.title: Corporate Website — Law Firm
1.description: Corporate site for a law firm focused on building authority and generating qualified leads.

2.title: Corporate Website — Health Clinic
2.description: Online platform for a medical clinic with scheduling, specialties and patient portal.

3.title: Corporate Website — Construction
3.description: Real estate development site with virtual tours and project gallery.

4.title: Landing Page — SaaS
4.description: High-conversion landing page for a SaaS product with animated hero and social proof.

5.title: Landing Page — Event
5.description: Corporate event page with countdown, schedule and online registration.

6.title: App — Internal System
6.description: Internal management app with product catalog, support tickets and inventory control.

7.title: App — Field Management
7.description: Mobile app for field teams with checklists, routes and offline reporting.

8.title: Financial Dashboard
8.description: Financial management panel with cash flow, metrics and exportable reports.

9.title: Logistics System

approach.headline: How we work
approach.sub: Straightforward process, no surprises. You follow every step.

1.title: Understand
1.description: We map the problem, the audience and the goals before writing a single line of code.

2.title: Design
2.description: Prototypes and wireframes validated with you before implementation.

3.title: Build
3.description: Short sprints with incremental deliveries. You test from day one.

4.title: Deliver
4.description: Deployment, monitoring and post-launch support included in every project.

cta.headline: Ready to build something that works?
cta.sub: Tell us about your project. We respond within 24 hours.

footer.description: Software studio based in Orlando and Rio de Janeiro. We build digital solutions that work.

services.headline: Our services
services.sub: From first wireframe to production deploy. We deliver complete projects with clean code and design that works.

web.title: Web Development
web.description: Sites, platforms and modern web applications with React, Next.js and Node.js. Performance, SEO and responsiveness are standard, not extras.

mobile.title: Mobile Development
mobile.description: Apps for iOS and Android with React Native and Swift. User-centered design and integration with existing APIs.

systems.title: Systems & Automation
systems.description: Internal systems that replace spreadsheets and manual processes. ERPs, CRMs and custom-built tools.

ai.title: AI Solutions
ai.description: We integrate artificial intelligence into existing products or build AI-first solutions from scratch.

design.title: UI/UX Design
design.description: Interface design that makes sense. Research, prototypes and design systems to scale your product.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting
consulting.description: We help you make technology decisions. Architecture, stack, scaling and migration.

portfolio.headline: Portfolio
portfolio.sub: Real projects for real clients. Names omitted due to contractual restrictions.

about.headline: About KORT.X
about.sub: We're a software studio that exists to solve real problems with technology.

story.headline: Our story
story.p1: KORT.X was born from frustration with software that doesn't work. Late projects, bad code, generic design. We decided to do it differently.
story.p2: We started in Rio de Janeiro and expanded to Orlando. Today we serve clients on two continents with the same quality standard.

1.title: Code is craft
1.description: We write code like craftsmen. Every line has a purpose.

2.title: Design with intent
2.description: Every pixel exists for a reason. If it doesn't solve a problem, it doesn't ship.

3.title: Real delivery
3.description: We promise what we can deliver. We deliver what we promise.

4.title: Full transparency
4.description: You see everything: code, progress, decisions. No black boxes.

team.headline: Team
team.description: Lean, multidisciplinary, senior team. No juniors learning on your project.

contact.headline: Get in touch
contact.sub: Tell us about your project. We respond within 24 hours.

form.name: Your name
form.success: Message sent! We'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Failed to send. Please try again or reach out via email.

info.headline: Other ways to reach us
info.address: Orlando, FL & Rio de Janeiro, RJ

aiFirst.headline: AI-First Development
aiFirst.sub: We don't bolt on AI as a feature. We build with AI from day one.

what.headline: What does AI-First mean?
what.description: It means artificial intelligence isn't a module we add later. It's part of the architecture, the data flow and the user experience from the first commit.

1.title: Integrated LLMs
1.description: GPT-4, Claude and open-source models integrated directly into products.

2.title: Smart automation
2.description: Processes that adapt and improve with usage, no fixed rules.

3.title: Data as advantage
3.description: We turn raw data into actionable insights with ML pipelines.

4.title: Conversational UX
4.description: Interfaces that understand natural language, not just clicks.
